nasb.text: Behold, the money which we found in the mouth of our sacks we have brought back to you from the land of Canaan. How then could we steal silver or gold from your lord’s house?

esv.text: Behold, the money that we found in the mouths of our sacks we brought back to you from the land of Canaan. How then could we steal silver or gold from your lord’s house?

cnv.text: 你看，我們從前在袋口發現的銀子，尚且從迦南地帶來還給你，我們又怎會從你主人的家裡偷取金銀呢？

ccb.text: 你看，我们把上次在口袋里发现的钱都从迦南带回来还你了，又怎么会偷你主人家的金银呢？

csbs.text: 看哪，我们先前在袋子口发现的银子，尚且从迦南地带回来给你，我们怎么会从你主人的家偷窃金银呢？
